name: Pumpkin-Apple Pie-gnfk05b
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Apple, pared and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan, combine the brown sugar, cornstarch, 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon, and 1/4 teaspoon salt. Stir in the water and butter. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture comes to a boil.
2. Carefully add the apple slices and cook for another 4 minutes. Remove from the heat and set aside.
3. In a bowl, combine the egg, sugar, pumpkin, 1/4 teaspoon salt, spices (cinnamon, ginger, clove), and evaporated milk. Beat until well blended using a rotary or electric mixer on low speed.
4. Pour the apple mixture into the unbaked pie shell. Spoon an even layer of the pumpkin mixture over the apple mixture.
5. Bake in a preheated 425 degree F (220 degree C) oven for 10 minutes. Reduce the oven temperature to 375 degrees F (190 degree C) and bake another 40 minutes, or until the filling is set around the edge. Cool on a wire rack.
